note_text: Wound note - Leftlowerleg. Meas 4.0x4.4x0.2cm. Heavy serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 62% gran, 38% slough. Periwound erythematous. NPWT canister changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Espinoza notified.

Pt seen for wound eval. Venous Left lower leg measures aprx 4.0 x 4.4cm, depth 0.2cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 2.4x2.6, 0.1cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
